meta.description: .core - a full-cycle engineer: I design, build, and ship real products to production under the DotCore brand.

hero.subtitle: .core gathers different products into one system: each project stands on its own, but ships under the shared DotCore brand. It is the core where ideas, repositories, and directions meet.

about.title: One person, many dots.
about.lede: A solo developer who builds each solution as 'one task — one repository', yet all of them live under a shared brand.

stack.title: What I ship products with.
stack.lede: Deep backend, pragmatic frontend, real DevOps, and ML where it genuinely earns its place. The tool follows the problem.

projects.title: Products, not demos.
projects.lede: Each project is a finished system with its own idea, its own engineering decisions, and its own repository. Open a card: inside is the concept, the architecture, and what sets the project apart.
projects.scrollHint: scroll - a path through the months

timeline.title: How it was built.
timeline.lede: The products shipped one after another, each with its own challenge. A month-by-month timeline.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.lede: Need an engineer who will carry a product all the way to real users, or want to discuss a project? Write to me. I keep it to the point.
contact.briefLede: Pick the context and the email opens with a prepared subject.
contact.subjectProject: I want to discuss a project
contact.emailBody: Hi. I am writing from the .core site.

footer.cta: from idea to production. new products in the works.

case.architectureLede: Hover or tap a node to highlight its links.
case.metricsLede: size and timeframe: what stands behind the product.
case.capabilitiesLede: the product's key capabilities right now.
case.engineeringLede: why it's built this way and not another.
case.codeLede: One real fragment of a key mechanism - how it looks in the repo.
case.timelineLede: how the product grew from its first version.
